code:
import io
import string

fn parse_token(_ tok: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()

  if n == 0
    println("")
    Ok(())
  else
    let first_tok = match tokens.get(0)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end

    mut current_max = parse_token(first_tok)
    mut result = "#{current_max}"
    mut i = 1

    while i < n
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        ""
      end
      let val = parse_token(tok)
      if val > current_max
        current_max = val
      end
      result = "#{result} #{current_max}"
      i = i + 1
    end

    println(result)
    Ok(())
  end
end
